metadata.name: Sanjana Peter
metadata.purpose: RAG knowledge base for personal chatbot — covers career, technical skills, projects, and background

identity.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Technical Lead | AI-Powered SaaS

summary.headline: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years building enterprise SaaS platforms, recommendation systems, and scalable backend services.
summary.narrative: I build the backend systems that make AI-powered products work reliably in production. With 8+ years across enterprise SaaS, recommendation systems, and scalable backend services, I've worked across the full product lifecycle — from architecture and system design through implementation, deployment, and production support. I've led cross-functional teams of 12 engineers, collaborated directly with enterprise clients, and delivered business-critical platforms under aggressive timelines.
differentiators: Deep expertise in NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and AWS applied to enterprise-scale products
Hands-on AI/ML experience: built production AI integrations and conducted graduate ML research (95% accuracy, BLE intrusion detection)
Certified in AI Agents (Google 5-Day Intensive), MCP, and Open-Source Inference
Proven technical leadership: led 10–12 person cross-functional engineering teams
Currently active in agentic/LLM workflows and building with MCP

work_experience.summary: Built the Learning Lab within Korn Ferry's new Talent Suite — a global enterprise learning platform serving Fortune 500 organizations.
key_contributions: Spearheaded development of the Learning Lab within Korn Ferry Talent Suite from design through production release.
Architected a configurable recommendation engine using json-rules-engine, reducing onboarding effort for client-specific recommendation models by approximately 30%.
Integrated AI-powered role-play vendor Yoodli and learning platform Thought Industries via secure API design, data synchronization, and end-to-end workflow orchestration.
Designed PostgreSQL database schemas, entity relationships, and indexing strategies supporting scalable learning workflows; improved platform responsiveness by ~20%.
Developed 15+ RESTful APIs using Node.js, NestJS, TypeORM, and PostgreSQL for learner progress tracking, recommendation workflows, content management, and enterprise integrations.
Built enterprise React.js applications using TypeScript, Material UI, Zustand, and TanStack Query; developed reusable component libraries.
Leveraged Cursor AI and AI-assisted workflows to accelerate feature delivery; contributed to CI/CD pipeline improvements using GitHub Actions.

work_experience.summary: Part-time IT support role held concurrently with Master's degree studies.
key_contributions: Provided technical support for campus network infrastructure, troubleshooting device connectivity and network issues.
Collaborated with IT team on system maintenance, hardware deployments, and technology upgrades.

work_experience.role: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Technical Lead
work_experience.summary: Led a cross-functional engineering team delivering enterprise healthcare and talent management platforms. Assumed full delivery ownership after a leadership transition.
key_contributions: Led a cross-functional team of 10–12 engineers across frontend, backend, QA, and product for enterprise platforms.
Assumed ownership of platform delivery following a leadership transition — worked directly with enterprise clients under aggressive timelines.
Improved PostgreSQL query performance by up to 50% through indexing, execution plan analysis, and query optimization.
Built HIPAA-compliant backend services with Azure AD SAML 2.0 SSO, JWT, OAuth, and RBAC.
Designed and developed 30+ RESTful APIs supporting healthcare workflows, enterprise integrations, and mobile app functionality.
Directed architecture decisions, sprint planning, code reviews, release management, and production deployments.

work_experience.summary: Worked on backend systems and APIs for Precily's AI-driven talent intelligence platform.
key_contributions: Contributed to feature development, system performance, and backend reliability in a fast-paced, high-expectation environment.

work_experience.summary: Designed and developed full-stack enterprise applications and 100+ RESTful APIs across 5–6 projects spanning multiple industries.
key_contributions: Designed and developed RESTful APIs and backend services for scalable, data-driven applications.
Built Elasticsearch-powered search and analytics capabilities.
Integrated third-party APIs for authentication, notifications, reporting, and workflow automation.
Built data pipelines for extraction, cleansing, transformation, and indexing of large datasets.

highlights: Top 1% of cohort per faculty recommendation
Conducted ML research on BLE intrusion detection
Worked part-time for Marist IT Network Department throughout program
Actively pursued skills outside classroom: certifications, research projects, independent study

education.institution: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU)

research.title: ML-Based Intrusion Detection System for BLE Cyber-Attacks
research.description: Built the full machine learning pipeline for a research team developing a BLE-based intrusion detection system.
research.methodology: Iterated from logistic regression to a RandomForest model. Handled data cleansing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and IDS integration.

certifications.name: AI Agents 101: Building AI Agents with MCP and Open-Source Inference

recommendations.excerpt: Sanjana was easily one of the top 1% of students in her cohort and potentially in the entire program for her 2 years. She came to see me more than professionals I have coached on leadership during my 26 years at IBM. Highly endorsed for any position.

recommendations.recommender_title: Full Stack Developer (Lead Developer at Korn Ferry)
recommendations.excerpt: Sanjana is one of the finest engineers I have worked with and would be a tremendous asset on any software engineering team. I highly recommend her.
Sanjana leads by example and many people at Precily AI find her enthusiasm and dedication both inspiring and motivating.

recommendations.recommender_title: Senior Software Engineer at Morgan Stanley India
recommendations.excerpt: She always kept her cool in times of pressure which had always made a dramatic difference in the production level of our team.

faqs.q: What is Sanjana's current employment status?
faqs.a: Sanjana is currently employed as a Full Stack Software Engineer at iSpace, Inc. (client: Korn Ferry) since June 2025, and is also open to new senior engineering or technical lead opportunities.

faqs.q: What is Sanjana's total years of experience?
faqs.a: Sanjana has 8+ years of professional software engineering experience, spanning roles from Software Engineer to Senior Engineer and Technical Lead.

faqs.q: What kind of roles is Sanjana looking for?
faqs.a: Sanjana is open to Senior Software Engineer and Technical Lead roles — especially at companies where AI is a core part of the product. She is interested in enterprise SaaS, AI-powered products, and learning technology. She is open to remote, hybrid, and on-site work in the United States and other locations.

faqs.q: What is Sanjana's core tech stack?
faqs.a: Node.js, TypeScript, NestJS, React.js, PostgreSQL, and AWS. She also has deep experience with Docker, REST APIs, TypeORM, and AI integrations.

faqs.q: Has Sanjana worked with AI or LLMs?
faqs.a: Yes. Sanjana has integrated AI vendors (Yoodli for role-play, Thought Industries for learning), built a rules-based recommendation engine, completed the Google 5-Day AI Agents Intensive and AMD MCP certification, and conducted ML research achieving 95.11% accuracy on a BLE intrusion detection model. She is actively building with LLM workflows and agentic systems.

Yes. At Eliptico IT Solutions, she led a cross-functional team of 10–12 engineers across frontend, backend, QA, and product — managing architecture, sprint planning, code reviews, release management, and client communication.
Sanjana holds a Master of Science in Information Systems Management from Marist University (GPA 3.95, graduated May 2025) and a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science from AKTU (2012–2016).

Her public repositories include careerpilot-ai (job search OS), secure-autofill (encrypted Chrome autofill), github-actions-cicd-platform (CI/CD template), seed-to-social (content repurposing), personal-ai-avatar (RAG recruiter chatbot), and leetcode-solutions.

faqs.q: What are people who have worked with Sanjana saying about her?
faqs.a: Colleagues and managers consistently highlight her as one of the finest engineers they've worked with, praising her complex problem-solving ability, calm under pressure, proactive attitude, and natural leadership. Her lead developer at Korn Ferry called her 'one of the finest engineers I have worked with.' Her Marist professor ranked her top 1% of her cohort.
You can reach Sanjana at sanjanapeter.career@gmail.com, connect on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/sanjana-peter, or view her work at github.com/sanjanapeterlead.
